title: Sprint Status
description: Cumulative sprint state tracked by the Orchestrator. Planner injects `verificationCommands` into each new Sprint prompt so prior checks are automatically re-run (regression guard).
x-purpose: Dual-purpose: (1) regression guard via verificationCommands, (2) fuel for Orchestrator re-incarnation via `handoff` field. After a context compaction or fresh session boot, a new Orchestrator reads this file + .vibe/agent/handoff.md to restore state losslessly.

addedVerificationCommands.description: Verification commands introduced by this Sprint that later Sprints must keep green.

verificationCommands.description: Union of all verification commands that must still pass. Planner injects this into each Sprint's 'Regression guard' section.

handoff.description: Orchestrator re-incarnation fuel. Updated at every meaningful checkpoint so a fresh Orchestrator can resume without loss after context compaction or session restart.

lastActionSummary.description: One-line summary of the most recent action completed by the Orchestrator.

openIssues.description: Unresolved blockers or pending user questions.

orchestratorContextBudget.description: Self-assessed context pressure. 'high' means a Planner/Evaluator spawn or re-incarnation is imminent.

preferencesActive.description: Active cross-session preferences that must survive compaction (e.g. 'ko-informal', 'autonomous-until-artifact').

handoffDocPath.description: Path to the narrative handoff file, typically '.vibe/agent/handoff.md'.

sandboxNotes.description: Known sandbox-only failures that Orchestrator handles outside the sandbox.

runOutsideSandbox.description: true if this command requires network/build and must run outside the Generator sandbox
